description: Instagram Web automation playbook. v2.3: caption is contenteditable not textarea, .value= fails on Instagram, Done/Save can be div[role=button], photo upload flow, strict verification for posts+profile.

navigation.create_parent: The clickable element is the PARENT of svg[aria-label='New post'] — click the <a> or <div> wrapping the SVG, not the SVG itself

engagement.comment_input: textarea[aria-label='Add a comment…'], textarea[placeholder='Add a comment…'], textarea[placeholder*='comment']

create_post.trigger: svg[aria-label='New post'] (click its parent element, not the SVG)

steps: Navigate to home URL (NOT /create/select/ — it resolves to @create profile).
Find svg[aria-label='New post'] and click its PARENT element (the wrapping <a> or <div>).
Wait for file input to appear: input[type='file'].
Upload media via file input.
Click Next (first time — crop/filter step).
Click Next (second time — caption step).

Fill caption: use div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='true'][aria-label*='caption'] — focus it, then type via browser_fill_form or Input events. NEVER use .value= (it does nothing on contenteditable).
Click Share (can be button OR div[role='button']).
VERIFY: (1) navigate to profile, confirm post URL exists, (2) open post URL, confirm unique caption phrase is rendered.
notes: CRITICAL: /create/select/ resolves to @create profile page — never use it as a URL.
Create trigger must be clicked precisely on the parent of svg[aria-label='New post']. Generic text click can hit wrong container.
Two Next clicks are required: first for crop/filter, second to reach caption/share.
Caption is div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='true'], NOT textarea. Setting .value= does nothing — must focus + type via CDP keyboard events (browser_fill_form).
Caption in web composer can fail to persist — always verify final post page content, not just dialog state.
Done/Save/Next/Share buttons can be div[role='button'], not native <button> — match both in selectors.

PUBLISH VERIFICATION: (1) navigate to profile, confirm new post URL exists, (2) open post URL, confirm unique caption phrase is rendered in page text. Dialog-close or Share click alone is NOT reliable.

steps: Navigate to reels URL.
Use like/comment/share/save selectors on active reel.
Use follow_text selector for creator follow button.
Navigate to messages URL.
Use dm.search_input to find recipient.
Click dm.new_message if inbox is empty.
Type in dm.composer — supports both textarea and contenteditable div.
On home/reels, click engagement.comment selector.
Wait for post page/dialog to open.
Type into engagement.comment_input.
Look for Post button to submit. If no Post button found, try pressing Enter as fallback.
VERIFY: Enter fallback can fail silently — check if comment actually appeared in DOM after submit.

selectors.comment_input: textarea[aria-label='Add a comment…'], textarea[placeholder='Add a comment…'], textarea[placeholder*='comment']

notes: Comment flow is inconsistent on web — Post button may not appear.
Enter key fallback can fail silently. Always verify comment was actually posted by checking DOM.
Verified path opens https://www.instagram.com/p/... and exposes aria-label='Add a comment…'.

steps: Use follow_text (text=/^Follow$/i) on feed/reels/profile context.
Avoid class-based selectors; they are unstable.
Use semantic selectors (aria-label, text match) — this holds across all pages.
Navigate to edit_profile URL.
Set settings.bio (reliable on web). Use focus + type events, not .value=.
Website field may be blocked/limited in some UI variants — skip if not editable.
Submit via settings.submit (button[type='submit'] or div[role='button']).
VERIFY: reload profile page, check rendered bio text changed.
notes: Verified on Edit profile page title: 'Edit profile • Instagram'.
Bio is reliably editable. Website field can be blocked/limited in this UI variant.
For name changes, use Accounts Center flow instead (see change_name flow).
Submit/Done actions can be div[role='button'], not native <button>.

steps: Navigate to edit_profile URL.
Find hidden input[type='file'] on the page.
Set file via input.files programmatically or trigger click on avatar/change photo button.
Wait for crop/apply dialog if it appears.
Click Apply/Save (can be div[role='button']).
VERIFY: reload profile, check img[alt*=profile] src changed.
notes: File input is hidden — trigger it by clicking the change photo button or programmatically.
Crop/apply step may appear after upload. Apply can be div[role='button'].

steps: Navigate to Accounts Center: https://accountscenter.instagram.com/
Go to /profiles/{profile_id}/name/
Update first name and/or last name fields.
Click Done to confirm (can be div[role='button'], not native button).
VERIFY: reload profile page, check rendered name changed.
Name change is account-wide (applies to Instagram + Facebook if linked).
notes: Name cannot be changed from /accounts/edit/ — must go through Accounts Center.
Accounts Center is at accountscenter.instagram.com (separate subdomain).
Successfully used to change name to 'ScreenHand'.
Done button can be div[role='button'], not native <button>.
Name changes may have cooldown limits — Instagram restricts frequent changes.

errors.error: /create/select/ resolves to @create profile instead of post composer
errors.solution: NEVER navigate to /create/select/. Instead, go to home page and click the parent element of svg[aria-label='New post'] in the left nav.

errors.error: Create trigger click opens nothing — composer doesn't appear
errors.context: Clicking broad container elements instead of precise create button
errors.solution: Target svg[aria-label='New post'] specifically, then click its direct parent element. Do not click outer wrapper divs.

errors.error: Caption field not found after upload
errors.context: Caption can be textarea OR contenteditable div depending on Instagram version
errors.solution: Try textarea[aria-label*='caption'] first. If not found, try div[contenteditable='true'][role='textbox'][aria-label*='caption']. For contenteditable, use browser_fill_form or Input.insertText instead of el.value=.

errors.error: Only one Next click — stuck on filter/crop screen
errors.context: Upload flow requires TWO Next clicks before reaching caption/share
errors.solution: Click Next, wait 500ms, then click Next again. First Next goes past crop/filter, second Next reaches caption step.

errors.error: Post appears published but content not actually live
errors.context: Share button click returns success but post didn't actually publish
errors.solution: After clicking Share, verify: (1) URL changed to /p/{id}/, (2) caption text is rendered in page body, (3) wait 2-3 seconds for server sync.

errors.error: Comment Post button missing — Enter key fails silently
errors.context: Comment submission on web is inconsistent
errors.solution: After typing comment, look for button with text 'Post'. If found, click it. If not, press Enter. Then VERIFY the comment appeared in DOM — Enter can fail silently.

errors.error: Notifications nav href not always present in left rail
errors.solution: Navigate directly to /notifications/ or click by aria-label/text.

errors.error: Follow button lacks stable unique CSS attributes
errors.context: Follow is a plain button with text in multiple contexts
errors.solution: Use text-based matcher: button,[role='button'] with /^Follow$/i. Never use class-based selectors.

errors.context: Instagram obfuscates CSS class names — they change frequently
errors.solution: Always use semantic selectors: aria-label, href routes, placeholder text, role attributes. These are stable across sessions.

errors.context: Web profile edit page does not expose name fields
errors.solution: Go to Accounts Center: accountscenter.instagram.com/profiles/{profile_id}/name/ — click Done to save. Works reliably.

errors.error: Website field blocked or limited in web profile edit
errors.context: Some UI variants of /accounts/edit/ restrict the website input
errors.solution: Skip website if not editable. Bio is always reliable. Try again from mobile app if website is critical.

errors.error: Caption does not persist after Share click
errors.context: Web composer caption can silently fail to save
errors.solution: After Share, navigate to the post URL on your profile and verify the rendered caption text matches. Re-edit if needed via post options.

errors.error: Setting .value= on caption field does nothing
errors.context: Instagram post caption is div[contenteditable='true'], not input/textarea
errors.solution: Focus the contenteditable div, then type via browser_fill_form (CDP Input.dispatchKeyEvent). Never use el.value= on contenteditable elements.

errors.error: Done/Save/Next/Share button not found — looking for <button> only
errors.context: Instagram uses div[role='button'] for many action buttons, not native <button>
errors.solution: Match both: button (text=/^Done$/i) AND div[role='button'] (text=/^Done$/i). Always include role='button' in selectors.

errors.error: Profile changes appear saved but not reflected on profile
errors.context: Edit profile submit can succeed without changes persisting
errors.solution: After saving, reload profile page and verify: rendered name, bio text, and profile photo src all match expected values.

best_practices: Always use aria-label and href selectors over class names — Instagram obfuscates classes.
For create flow: home page → svg[aria-label='New post'] parent click → file input → Next → Next → caption → Share.
Caption fields can be textarea or contenteditable — support both in automation.
Always verify post-action results: post URL on profile + rendered caption text on post page. Dialog-close/Share click is NOT enough.
Comment submission: prefer Post button over Enter key; verify comment appeared in DOM.
Use browser_stealth before any Instagram automation to hide webdriver flag.
Use browser_fill_form for typing (CDP keyboard events) — Instagram detects el.value= assignments.
For contenteditable fields (caption, DM): focus + type via CDP events. .value= does NOTHING on contenteditable.
Done/Save/Next/Share can be div[role='button'] — always match both button and div[role='button'] in selectors.
For name changes, use Accounts Center (accountscenter.instagram.com) — not /accounts/edit/.
Website field can be blocked in web UI — bio is always reliable.
Profile photo upload uses hidden input[type='file'] — may need crop/apply step after.
Verification must be strict: for posts check live URL + caption text; for profile check rendered name/bio/photo src.
